sourcesContent:
import api from "./api";

const base = "/api/doctors";

const doctorService = {
  registerDoctor: (payload) => api.post(`${base}/register`, payload),
  getDoctorById: (doctorId) => api.get(`${base}/${doctorId}`),
  getDoctorByUserId: (userId) => api.get(`${base}/user/${userId}`),
  updateDoctorProfile: (doctorId, payload) => api.put(`${base}/${doctorId}/profile`, payload),

  setAvailability: (doctorId, payload) => api.post(`${base}/${doctorId}/availability`, payload),
  getAvailabilities: (doctorId) => api.get(`${base}/${doctorId}/availability`),
  getAvailableSlots: (doctorId, date) =>
    api.get(`${base}/${doctorId}/availability/slots`, { params: { date } }),
  deleteAvailability: (doctorId, availabilityId) =>
    api.delete(`${base}/${doctorId}/availability/${availabilityId}`),

  issuePrescription: (doctorId, payload) => api.post(`${base}/${doctorId}/prescriptions`, payload),
  getPrescriptions: (doctorId) => api.get(`${base}/${doctorId}/prescriptions`),
  getPrescriptionById: (prescriptionId) => api.get(`${base}/prescriptions/${prescriptionId}`),

  createVideoSession: (payload) => api.post(`${base}/video/sessions`, payload),
  joinVideoSession: (payload) => api.post(`${base}/video/sessions/join`, payload),
  endVideoSession: (payload) => api.post(`${base}/video/sessions/end`, payload)
};

export default doctorService;
